title: How Do I List My Car on BuyAndScrap? Your Easy UK Guide

content:
# How Do I List My Car on BuyAndScrap? Your Easy UK Guide

To list your car on BuyAndScrap, simply visit our "Sell Your Car" page. You will enter your UK registration number, provide key details about your vehicle, upload clear photos, and then set your asking price. The entire process is straightforward, helping you connect with potential buyers across the UK quickly and easily.

## Getting Your Car Ready to List

Careful preparation makes your car listing stand out. Buyers appreciate honesty and well-presented vehicles. Follow these simple steps before you go online.

### Gather All Key Documents and Details

Collect all essential information about your car. This includes the current mileage, MOT certificate, service history, and the V5C logbook. Note any recent work done or significant features like air conditioning or parking sensors. Buyers favour transparency, so be ready to share these facts.

### Clean Your Car Inside and Out

First impressions matter greatly. Give your car a thorough wash and vacuum. Clean the interior, windows, and dashboard. A spotless car photographs much better and signals it has been well cared for.

### Take High-Quality Photos

Good photos attract more attention. Take clear, well-lit pictures from various angles. Include shots of the exterior, interior, dashboard, wheels, and any unique features. Always use natural daylight if possible. Avoid blurry or dark images.

## How Do I List My Car on BuyAndScrap: The Step-by-Step Process

Listing your car with us is designed to be user-friendly. Here’s a simple guide to get your vehicle live on BuyAndScrap.

### Step 1: Head to Our 'Sell Your Car' Page

Navigate to the dedicated [Sell Your Car](/sell) section on our website. You'll find a clear button or link on our homepage. This is your starting point for creating a new listing.

### Step 2: Enter Your UK Registration Number

Type in your car's UK registration number as prompted. Our system will automatically fetch basic details about your vehicle. This saves you time and ensures accuracy from the start.

### Step 3: Add More Details and Describe Its Condition

Now, add the specific information you gathered earlier. Describe your car's condition accurately, both inside and out. Highlight its best features. Be honest about any minor wear and tear; this builds trust with potential buyers.

### Step 4: Upload Your Best Photos

Upload the high-quality photos you took. Our platform allows for multiple images, so showcase your car fully. Remember, more good photos mean more buyer interest.

### Step 5: Set Your Price and Go Live!

Research similar cars on our [Browse Cars](/cars) section to set a competitive price. Consider your car's condition, mileage, and specification. Once you are happy with all details, hit 'Go Live'. Your car will then be visible to thousands of potential UK buyers.

## What Happens After You List Your Car?

Once your car is live on BuyAndScrap, interested buyers will start to contact you. The process from here is straightforward and secure.

### Responding to Enquiries

Buyers will message you through our secure messaging system. Respond promptly to their questions. Be ready to provide more details or clarify anything in your listing. Quick, helpful responses often lead to viewings.

### Arranging Viewings Safely

When a buyer wants to view your car, arrange a safe, public place or have someone with you at home. Always check their driving licence if they ask for a test drive. You should also ensure they have valid insurance. Never let them drive the car alone. For more advice, check our [Guides](/guides) section on safe selling.

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

Got more questions about listing your car? Here are some common queries.

### How much does it cost to list my car on BuyAndScrap?

Listing your car on BuyAndScrap is completely free. There are no hidden fees or charges to get your vehicle advertised to thousands of potential buyers across the UK.

### What essential car details do I need before I list?

You need your car's UK registration number, current mileage, MOT expiry date (you can check this with our [Free MOT Checker](/mot-checker)), service history, and a realistic assessment of its condition. The more detail, the better.

### How can I make my car listing stand out from others?

To make your listing stand out, ensure you have excellent, clear photos taken in good light. Write an honest and detailed description highlighting key features. Price your car competitively by researching similar models on BuyAndScrap.

## Ready to Sell Your Car?

Listing your car on BuyAndScrap is designed to be simple and effective. Follow these steps, and you'll be well on your way to a successful sale. 

[List Your Car Now!](/sell)
